lifecycle_summary: LoadProviderSchema reads a gzipped or plain JSON terraform provider schema file produced by terraform providers schema -json, merges metadata-nested attributes for Kubernetes-style lookups, and returns a ProviderSchemaInfo. InferIdentityKeys walks identityKeyPatterns then falls back to *_name/*_identifier suffix attributes to pick stable name keys per resource. ClassifyResourceService strips the provider prefix and uses the serviceCategories table (longest prefix match) to return a service family. ClassifyResourceService is consulted by ClassifyResourceCategory to return a broad category label. DefaultSchemaDir resolves the packaged schemas directory, preferring the PCG_TERRAFORM_SCHEMA_DIR env override.

entry_points.name: LoadProviderSchema
entry_points.role: load and normalize a single provider schema file

entry_points.name: InferIdentityKeys
entry_points.role: infer stable resource identity keys from attributes
